title: What NGE Character would you want to be survey in Japan
display_title: What NGE Character would you want to be survey in Japan
wikitext:
[]: What NGE Character would you want to be (survey in Japan)             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 22, 2010 11:59 pm http://www.news2u.net/releases/79872 Of the 224 males surveyed: Shinji 32.1% Rei 11.6% Kaji 8.0% Kaworu 5.8% Gendo 4.5% From someone who wanted to be Shinji: "I might have a chance to meet other cute girls" (lol) From someone who wanted to be Rei: "I want to attract people with my mysterious charm" Of the 508 females surveyed: Rei 28.9% Misato 9.1% Asuka 8.9% Shinji 3.1% Kaworu 3.0% From someone who wanted to be Rei: "I wanted to master talking that way" From someone who wanted to be Misato: "I like strong-willed women" I guess most guys in Japan don't want to be Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Dec 23, 2010 12:33 am I guess most guys in Japan don't want to be Asuka.

[]: Re: What NGE Character would you want to be (survey in Japan             Quote Post by Combs » Thu Dec 23, 2010 12:36 am Ornette wrote: http://www.news2u.net/releases/79872 Shinji 32.1% Rei 11.6%

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Dec 23, 2010 7:19 am I can understand them wanting to be Shinji. I mean, he's SO insanely popular with the ladies and he's pretty badass even if he neither knows it nor looks like it. one Day, a pretty girl is going to fall out of the sky and crush him - Oh, wait, that already happened. And about being Rei... it's a similar factor I guess. She's not popular in universe, but... well, you know... On the other hand, I heard that Shinji has much more Fans in Japan, so that's another reason for ppl to want to be Rei XD I think It's quite a hard choice. Everyone in EVA has VERY admirable personality traits everyone would like to have, but also quite fatal flaws. Ritsuko and Asuka are introduced like TEH Competence and Coolness, but they're less than pretty on the inside. Misato is a mixed case. Of course, she isn't what she looks like at first either, but she manages to keep fighthing for the survival of humanity untill the bitter end, being one of the last ones to act reasonable despite all her problems, some of which are similar to my own. Shinji IS admirable, brave, nice and very talented. He just doesn't know. But not knowing that (and the general level of suck in his life) resulted in him doing some less than admirable things... I think I'd pick either Rei II, Kaworu or Mari. They are all ppl that look forward instead of complaining and are willing to give anything for what they deem important. It's hard to choose between the three cuz they're all so awesum...

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Dec 23, 2010 8:18 am see, everyone wants to be like Shinji!

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Thu Dec 23, 2010 8:35 am I seriously don't know why anyone would want to be Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Dec 23, 2010 9:57 am Hatsumi92 wrote: I seriously don't know why anyone would want to be Rei.

[]: Why am I even posting this? Everyone knows this already...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Dec 23, 2010 10:13 am Ornette wrote: From someone who wanted to be Shinji: "I might have a chance to meet other cute girls" (lol)

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 23, 2010 10:52 am Not too surprised by the results. It sucks to be Asuka, so no mystery as to why she received so few votes. Rei does okay, though. Also she's effectively immortal, so that doesn't hurt. As for Shinji...well, you have two hot chicks vying for your attention and you live with another, and that's before you factor in AU nonsense. He's got it pretty good all things considered.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Dec 23, 2010 11:09 am Bagheera wrote: Not too surprised by the results. It sucks to be Asuka, so no mystery as to why she received so few votes. Rei does okay, though. Also she's effectively immortal, so that doesn't hurt. As for Shinji...well, you have two hot chicks vying for your attention and you live with another, and that's before you factor in AU nonsense. He's got it pretty good all things considered.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Thu Dec 23, 2010 11:16 am Bagheera wrote: Not too surprised by the results. It sucks to be Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 23, 2010 11:33 am Eric Blair wrote: Agreed, when offered between having to earn something and getting it handed down on a plate, most would go for the lazy option; why have to work hard, claw your way up to somewhere, and actually break a sweat to earn something?

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Thu Dec 23, 2010 11:45 am Bagheera wrote: Ah, that's not why it sucks to be Asuka, chief.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Thu Dec 23, 2010 11:56 am Thankfully, that's just a minority...I hope.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Dec 23, 2010 6:05 pm If I kept the knowlege of what would happen and my personality, but got Shinji's hot body, I'd definitely be Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Fri Dec 24, 2010 12:58 am As a hilarious and tragic sidebar, I'm actually turning INTO Asuka personality-wise. My voice has become noticeably shriller when I talk, I get upset and impatient far easier, and I'm actually starting to say her ubiquitous catch-phrase in my daily life. People are starting to look at me funny. Anyway, back to your convo.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Fri Dec 24, 2010 1:35 am I'd probably become the mania version if Shinji or Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 24, 2010 12:56 pm I agree with Killer Bee about Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Fri Dec 24, 2010 1:01 pm Reichu wrote: I agree with Killer Bee about Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Dec 24, 2010 1:05 pm Eric Blair wrote: You just want to be Yui so you can fulfill your life long drem of having sex with Zerule and then bitting his head off.
